content.en:
Ye Tian felt that there was endless source energy pouring into his body from the source sea, as if it was similar to the picture of the Heavenly Wind Supreme breaking through to the Supreme One.

However, compared to the movement of the Heavenly Wind Supreme Breakthrough, he was just making a small fuss.

Soon, the breakthrough was completed.

At this time, Ye Tian was already a true third-class invincible, and his life level had changed.

"I should be a source sea creature by now!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At the same time, Ye Tian found that he was suppressed by the Feather Heaven and Earth to the point that he could only exert extremely weak strength.

This is a situation that all third-class invincibles will experience.

The third-class invincible is considered a source sea creature, even if he is born in a foreign world, it is difficult to return to his own foreign world, which is the suppression and rejection of powerful life by the foreign world.

However, Ye Tian, a third-class invincible, could still stay in the Dark Forbidden Domain and Feather Heaven and Earth, but it was difficult to exert much of his strength.

But once he was promoted to the second-rank invincible, he would not be able to stay in the foreign world.

Of course, for Ye Tian, this is not a difficult problem.

He can completely let his invincible clone be stationed in the Feather Heaven and Earth, as long as he doesn't let the invincible clone advance to the second-rank invincible.

......

The years passed.

Ye Tian gradually stabilized his realm of a third-class invincible, and created several invincible ancestral techniques, making his strength even stronger.

In addition, he also began the cultivation of the fourth level of Wanyuan Returning to Ruins, gradually perfecting the fourth level of Wanyuan Returning to Ruins, and at the same time refining various resources to improve his cultivation.

this day.

Ye Tian began to create the Space Invincible Ancestral Technique, after all, he had already obtained the Spatial Eternal Ancestral Skill, if he didn't create the Spatial Invincible Ancestral Technique, wouldn't he have wasted this Eternal Ancestral Endowment in vain?

It took some time, and Ye Tian finally created it.

This space is an invincible ancestral skill, Ye Tian named it Shattered Void, it is an offensive space invincible ancestral skill, and it is also an invincible ancestral skill with the most powerful attack power in Ye Tian's hand at present.

Now, Ye Tian's next cultivation goal was to be promoted to a second-rank invincible.

If you want to become a second-class invincible, you must feed the soul with the body, and then cultivate the soul tribulation realm with the soul, so that the soul can be promoted to the invincible realm, and condense the soul invincible robbering body.

Ye Tian had taken the Void Mi Golden Fruit, and his soul had transformed to a realm comparable to that of a soul invincible, but it was only equivalent to a sixth-rank invincible.

However, he is not yet considered a true soul invincible body, because his soul has not crossed the tribulation.

Ye Tian is not in a hurry to cross the tribulation at present, his physical body has not yet reached the peak of the third-rank invincible realm, and there is still a lot of room for improvement, and it is undoubtedly a waste of potential to attack the second-rank invincible now.

So, he resisted the temptation of being quickly promoted to a second-class invincible, and went to cultivate Wanyuan Guiru with peace of mind, in order to raise Wanyuan Guiru to the fourth peak realm as soon as possible.

----------------

"Tianfeng Hai summoned me!"

Ye Tian received a summons from the Tianfeng Sea Branch, asking him to go to the Tianfeng Sea Headquarters in the Tianlin Realm immediately.

Immediately, Ye Tian rushed to the Tianlin Realm.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Tianfeng Sea headquarters.

Here, Ye Tian saw many invincible people, and the dense number of invincible people stood on a mountain peak, waiting for the instructions of the upper echelons of the Tianfeng Sea.

When the number of invincible people reached nearly one million, Ye Tiancai truly saw the strength of the old Saint Name-level forces, or the newly promoted Eternal Name-level forces, and this was still the tip of the iceberg of the Heavenly Wind Sea.

Rumble!!!!

The Qingyang Supreme descended, and his eyes looked at all the invincibles.

"I am the Heavenly Wind Sea Qingyang Supreme, and I have summoned you here this time to announce one thing, that is, the Heavenly Wind Sea will officially declare war on the Netherworld Temple from today!"

Qingyang Supreme announced.

When many invincible people heard the news, they were immediately shocked.

The Heavenly Wind Sea actually declared war on the Netherworld.

Before, they had also heard about the contradiction between the Heavenly Wind Supreme and the Netherworld Palace, but they thought that this was over, after all, all these years, the Heavenly Wind Sea had not made any moves.

But now, the real move has come.

In fact, over the years, the Heavenly Wind Supreme has been in retreat to stabilize the realm, and now that the realm is stable, he has come to find trouble with the Netherworld Palace.

Qingyang Supreme continued: "From today onwards, the sixth-rank and third-rank invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea will take revenge on the many branches of the Netherworld Hall outside the Tianlin Realm, killing a sixth-rank invincible in the Netherworld Hall and rewarding 100,000 contribution points, killing a fifth-rank invincible in the Netherworld Hall will reward 5 million contribution points, killing the fourth-rank invincible of the Netherworld Hall will reward 100 million contribution points, and killing the third-class invincible of the Netherworld Hall will reward one billion contribution points. "

Outlands are only allowed to accommodate third-class invincibles at most, so there is no reward for killing second-class invincibles.

For many invincibles, the contribution value is never enough, so such a reward can definitely attract them, and even fight for it.

In fact, as soon as this task is launched, for the invincible who was born in a foreign world, he must take it if he doesn't want to.

After all, Tianfeng Hai was able to issue this task, and the Netherworld Temple was naturally able to issue this task as well.

When the time comes, the invincible people of the Netherworld Temple will also come to hunt down the invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea in the foreign world, maybe his information has already fallen into the hands of the Netherworld.

With the power of the Netherworld, you may be able to find out the location of the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Unless he hides the Dark Forbidden Realm now, but it's too late.

"I knew I was hiding the Dark Forbidden Domain!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took over this task, took a piece of information, and left the Tianlin Realm, returning to the Dark Forbidden Domain as soon as possible.

Then, he began to arrange the formation in the Dark Forbidden Domain, although it was too late, but what if the invincible people of the Netherworld Temple did not come to the Dark Forbidden Domain?

In that case, wouldn't the Dark Forbidden Realm be affected?

In order to ensure the safety of the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian destroyed all the doors of the Dark Forbidden Domain, disconnecting the other exotic worlds from the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Year after year, the Heavenly Wind Sea and the Netherworld Temple fought in countless exotic worlds, and a large number of invincible people fell, and both sides fought very fiercely.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian successfully arranged the large array and covered the entire Dark Forbidden Domain.

"It seems that I overestimated myself, I don't have much reputation in the Heavenly Wind Sea, and it is impossible for the invincible people of the Netherworld Temple to investigate me specifically and find my dark forbidden domain. Ye Tian suddenly realized.

Hidden in the Dark Forbidden Zone, the risk of exposure here is close to zero.

Then, Ye Tian prepared to hunt down the invincible people of the Netherworld Temple.

For him, slaying the invincible in the Netherworld Temple is much faster than slaying the robber beasts to earn contribution points.
